creator: salojan@goto10.co
text:
gxemul 0.6.0.1 compiled without --debug switch fails to load and install at least ultrix/risc succesfully. However, compiling gxemul like:

export CXX="/usr/local/bin/c++48"
./configure --debug
make

and starting it:

LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/local/lib/gcc48 gxemul ...

fixes the problem.
